description: Listen people! Do not come to Sunset Car Wash and do bad thing. We had an issue today. I know the parties involved family's. The 2 individuals have been contacted and dealt with. It will not go any further, however they will never be allowed back on the property. If you want to deal drugs, do it somewhere else! We have 16 cameras. I know who are before you leave the lot. They were confronted while on the lot. Moral of this story, don't deal drugs on camera!!!!

layoutDescription: Boutique storefront feel: framed hero like a shop window, soft shadow, gallery as masonry; warm or refined palette depending on vertical.

photoInventory: You will receive 12 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
